action: ROOT CAUSE: a cycle-scoped audit structurally cannot catch cross-cutting / full-suite regressions, so cycles ship green-locally but RED-in-CI; the autonomous cycle-ship path also does not watch CI (unlike interactive /commit), so red ships go undetected until an operator checks. THREE recurrences observed, all the same disease: (A) Cycles 339-341 (routing campaign): generated go/acs/cycle<N>/predicates_test.go had a gofmt diff failing CI vet+fmt; and ~70 .evolve/profiles/*.json edits drifted projected phase-facts in skills/*/SKILL.md, failing cmd/evolve TestSkills_NoDrift (fixed fwd 965009c9: gofmt -w + 'evolve skills generate'). (B) Cycle 413: new exported NewDefaultWithStageCompact in phases/audit with no test naming it -> CI apicover -enforce UNCOVERED (fixed PR #288 fd52b8dc). (C) Cycles 423-426 (latency campaign): panestream 5 liveness types named only via New* constructors, and adapters/bridge Adapter.BootTimeoutStoreWired tested via its unexported field -> CI apicover -enforce UNCOVERED on both legs (fixed PR #290 squash 109f8008). LOOP FIX — make the cycle audit run the CI-equivalent checks over the cycle's CHANGED files/packages, all driver-agnostic and config-driven, each TDD red-first: (1) gofmt-clean assertion over the cycle's generated go/acs files in build/audit; (2) when a cycle edits .evolve/profiles/*.json or any SKILL.md SSOT, run 'evolve skills generate' WITHIN the cycle and commit the regenerated SKILL.md (OR add TestSkills_NoDrift to cycle regression scope); (3) run the EXISTING 'apicover -enforce' (go/cmd/apicover, -cover from the cycle coverage) over CHANGED enforced packages — intersect internal/changedpkgs with go/.apicover-enforce — and FAIL audit (block ship, not WARN) on any uncovered/false-green export. Mind the TWO apicover modes: UNCOVERED is AST-only (the exported identifier must be referenced in a _test AST; constructor calls / function-named tests / comments do NOT count) and is coverage-independent; FALSE-GREEN (named but 0% executed) is coverage-DEPENDENT and needs CI's exact 'go test -race -tags integration' coverage or it false-alarms on integration-only-executed symbols. Do not hardcode package lists (use go/.apicover-enforce + changedpkgs). Smallest correct change; strong review; preserve all existing audit behavior.
evidence_pointer: (A) commit 965009c9, .github/workflows/go.yml vet+fmt, go/cmd/evolve/cmd_skills_drift_test.go TestSkills_NoDrift; (B) PR #288 fd52b8dc apicover phases/audit; (C) PR #290 squash 109f8008 apicover panestream 5 types + adapters/bridge Adapter.BootTimeoutStoreWired; touched-package set via internal/changedpkgs; enforce list go/.apicover-enforce; CI cmd .github/workflows/go.yml step 'api-coverage enforce'
